blended.narrative: Mont Sutton is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
